title: Blade Of Time
description: Fabric 1.20.1 | This mod adds new powerful sword made of skint and essenses
body:
This mod adds a new very strong sword, which will take a lot of work to create.

![Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8d8c6517cca37d182a0aee7801e471a4ca5317d.png)


In order to create it, you first need to get skin - crystals that remain after the teleportation of creatures called planeswalkers. These crystals are preserved in libraries and other structures. But these crystals are too small, so you will have to look for quite a lot of them.

![Skint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b8290813da311813e870fe2585a5354b78c7fe.png)

Next you need to create a handle - a mystical stick, which is created from a blaze wand, a netherite ingot and the essence of time, which is in the library.

And the last ingredients - essences.

You only need three of them.

The essence of time which was described earlier, the essence of greatness, which is made from a skulk catalyst, a nether star, the essence of death, which can be obtained by killing a villager, and the essence of a dragon, which is also found in the library.
The last ingredient is the essence of the worlds, which is made from an obsidian skull, which is created from 9 obsidian, the essence of gravity, which is in the chest of the end city and the essence of the gods, which can be bought from the priest (does not work with the mod Numismatic overhaul)
